name: Santa Fe Chicken & Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare one bag of Success white rice according to package directions.
2. While the rice is cooking, spray a skillet with vegetable cooking spray and heat it over medium.
3. Add chicken tenders to the heated skillet and cook until they are no longer pink, about 6-8 minutes.
4. Stir in salsa, corn, rinsed black beans, and cooked rice.
5. Sprinkle with shredded Monterey jack cheese.
6. Continue heating until the cheese is melted. Serves 4.
